profil.nama: PT MSIG Life Insurance Indonesia Tbk
profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT MSIG Life Insurance Indonesia Tbk provides life insurance products in Indonesia. The company operates through six segments: Term Insurance, Endowment, Whole Life Insurance, and Health Insurance. It offers personal accident, medical, and medika ultimax; protection and unit link life insurance; and life insurance, such as smart life guard, smile berkat, income protection x-tra, bank sinarmas, bank bukopin, smile dana sejahtera, and smile pro infinite insurance products. The company also provides group insurance; education and pension insurance; and Sharia Insurance, as well as bancassurance products. It serves individual and group customers. The company was formerly known as PT Asuransi Jiwa Sinarmas MSIG Tbk and changed its name to PT MSIG Life Insurance Indonesia Tbk in July 2023. PT MSIG Life Insurance Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1984 and is based in Setiabudi, Indonesia. PT MSIG Life Insurance Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Mitsui Sumitomo Insurance Co., Ltd.
